title: boesenbergia uniflora
intro: Boesenbergia uniflora, also known as Ginger Lily or Pinellia, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Boesenbergia uniflora include its ability to aid digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and reduce pain and fever. Boesenbergia uniflora can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia.
